content.question: Evidence on whether alternative service-delivery models (multi-grade mixed-ability classrooms, shared specialist teachers, distance learning, microcredentialing) can sustain pedagogical quality and attainment in small rural schools is sparse and context-dependent; no Hungarian pilot or evaluation is cited in available literature.
content.reduction_path: Hungarian Ministry of Education or KPMG/World Bank-type evaluation of pedagogical and attainment outcomes in multi-grade or shared-resource rural school pilots, with comparison to consolidation-baseline outcomes.
